flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Utah Valley University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Utah Valley University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (37.8% → 45.1%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Utah Valley University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (14.8% → 17.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Utah Valley University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (65.9% → 73.1%).
